description: Email projects 25% growth with no methodology, timeframe, or assumptions — bare forecast. Should fail MISL-004.
text:
Hi friend,

A quick word on where we're heading.

We project 25% growth. We expect to be profitable. The market opportunity is enormous and we'll be capturing a meaningful share of it.

If that excites you, our crowd-sourced funding round opens on Birchal on 23 June 2026.

Sarah & the FarmThru team

Always consider the general CSF risk warning and offer document before investing.
